top_signals.title: AllianzGI chief executive warns of  AI ‘socialism’ as investors lean on chatbots
top_signals.summary: The chief executive of one of Europe’s largest asset managers has urged investors to avoid being over-reliant on general online chatbots to manage their portfolios, as it increases the risk of losses. Speaking at AllianzGI’s media day in Frankfurt, Tobias Pross, chief executive of AllianzGI, warned that relying on public online models, such as Claude, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin to $145K by October? Why this 'crazy accurate' 4chan prediction is sketchy
top_signals.summary: A viral 4chan Bitcoin prediction appears to have nailed past BTC prices, but edited targets and impossible supply claims weaken its $145,000 call.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Venture Global, EnBW Ink New LNG Supply Deals
top_signals.summary: U.S. liquefied natural gas producer (LNG) Venture Global and German utility EnBW have signed new binding agreements for the supply of approximately 0.82 million tonnes per annum (mtpa) of LNG over a period of about five years beginning in 2026.The…
